description: Educational-proxy Hang Seng Index (HK/China) total-return and HKD 1-year (HIBOR-linked) rate history, 2016-2025, plus trailing dividend yield and ATM 30-day implied volatility, used to drive the Phase 14 Task 2 GBM equity calibration (Gate G-03, risk MR-002). EDUCATIONAL PROXY series approximating published HSI / HKMA / Bloomberg levels; NOT a credentialled vendor feed. Replace with licensed market-data extracts and re-run sign-off before any regulatory, pricing, or capital-adequacy use.

daily_synthesis.method: Identical deterministic synthesis to the CNY fixture: per-year de-meaned seeded Gaussian daily log-returns reproducing the documented annual total return, with a Cholesky-correlated rate shock driving an intra-year random-walk deviation of the 1Y HKD rate around its documented year average so the realised equity/yield-change Pearson correlation recovers target_rate_equity_corr.

primary_sources: Hang Seng Index calendar-year total return (educational proxy levels)
HKD 1Y interbank/exchange-fund-bill rate, annual average (educational proxy levels)
Hang Seng Index trailing 12-month dividend yield (educational proxy)
HSI ATM 30-day option implied volatility / VHSI (educational proxy)
data_lineage.production_restriction: Proxy levels only. Replace with licensed HSI/HKMA/Bloomberg extracts and re-run sign-off before regulatory, pricing, or capital-adequacy use.

notes: 10 calendar years of daily synthesis (>= 2500 daily observations). HK equity carries a higher target vol and dividend yield than the CNY onshore market, consistent with published HSI characteristics; the HKD rate path tracks the USD-linked policy cycle (low 2020-2021, higher 2023-2024).
